meta.source: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines

tables.1: Misidentified / cross-contaminated, no verified authentic stock (verdict: red)
tables.2: Misidentified but authentic stock has been located (verdict: yellow / caution)

meta.note: Converted from the official v14 .xlsx via backend/scripts/build_iclac_register.py. Always link to the ICLAC page for the current version; do not treat this copy as canonical.
